summary:
Perfect! ✅ **The needle has been found and fixed!**

## Summary

**The Bug:** In `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default`, the nginx configuration had a **port mismatch**. The Flask backend runs on port **5000**, but the nginx reverse proxy was configured to forward requests to port **5001**.

**The Fix:** Changed line 13 from:
```nginx
proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;
```
to:
```nginx
proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;
```

**Test Result:** All tests now pass! ✅
